subcodes.first_line: O steadfast believer! Faith is as a lamp, and the heart like unto glass, and the limbs and members as the niche [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مومن ثابت ایمان بمثابه مصباح و قلب مانند زجاج و اعضا و ارکان بمنزله مشکاه
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @prayer for assistance; intercession, @praise and encouragement, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
